verification_gate: Red tests deny direct plugin/agent writes, prove envctl-only grants, ordered and idempotent drain/embed/commit/restart, exact commit identity and witness attachment, no acknowledgement before commit, and deterministic database-to-redb return projection.

gate_result.red_first: contracts committed red at envctl 0c11cf1 (stubs fail closed, 0/4), implementation green at 104ebc4 + 97ada5f (4/4)
gate_result.denial_evidence: the lifeos_runtime authoritative schema REVOKEs PUBLIC; an intruder role with schema USAGE but no envctl membership gets SQLSTATE 42501 insufficient_privilege from PostgreSQL itself on INSERT — denial at the database, not by convention
gate_result.grants_evidence: only lifeos_envctl holds INSERT on envctl_committed_records and UPDATE on the reconciliation cursor; every drain batch executes under SET LOCAL ROLE lifeos_envctl so the grants are exercised on every commit
gate_result.drain_evidence: codedb_outbox_export drains in sequence order beyond the cursor with stable sequence idempotency keys (ON CONFLICT (seq) DO NOTHING); batched (batch 2 proves multi-transaction ordering); replay commits nothing twice; new staging rows drain from the cursor, not from zero
gate_result.identity_evidence: every committed record carries pg_current_xact_id, pg_current_wal_lsn, and its batch generation; rows in one batch share a transaction id and batches differ; a chained sha256 witness links every record to its predecessor and verify_witness_chain recomputes the chain end-to-end
gate_result.ack_evidence: the cursor advance shares the commit transaction; an injected abort after all writes but before COMMIT leaves zero visible records and acknowledged_seq 0, and the retry commits exactly once
gate_result.projection_evidence: committed state projects back through the versioned flexnetos.redb-owner.v0 UDS protocol (token-authenticated puts of version/acknowledged_seq/generation/last_witness/committed_count); an in-test owner speaking the exact protocol records precisely the returned pairs, and identical committed state projects identical pairs
gate_result.credential_hygiene: DSNs are Unix-socket-only (TCP without the envctl TLS policy is refused); connection errors redact details; no secret plaintext logging
gate_result.full_suite: envctl-commit-worker committer suite 4/4 against a real PostgreSQL 17.10 service (durable meta/var cluster, disposable database envctl_commit_test); clippy clean
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: all four tests run the real worker against the real durable PostgreSQL 17.10 cluster over its Unix socket with real transactions, real grants, and a real UDS return-projection round trip

proof_summary: ARCHBP-042 is complete: envctl-commit-worker (envctl PR FlexNetOS/envctl#527, red 0c11cf1 → green 104ebc4/97ada5f) makes envctl the exclusive production PostgreSQL committer with the exclusivity enforced by PostgreSQL grants — an intruder insert into the lifeos_runtime authoritative tables fails with SQLSTATE 42501, and every drain batch runs under SET LOCAL ROLE lifeos_envctl. The worker drains the codedb_outbox_export staging contract in sequence order with stable idempotency keys, attaches exact commit identity (transaction id, WAL LSN, generation) plus a chained sha256 witness to every committed record, and advances the reconciliation cursor atomically with the commit so acknowledgement can never precede durability — an injected pre-COMMIT abort acknowledges nothing and the retry commits exactly once. Committed state projects back deterministically through the versioned flexnetos.redb-owner.v0 UDS protocol. Proven 4/4 against the real durable PostgreSQL 17.10 cluster.
